features: Apply the wet soap bar directly onto stained areas of fabric; it contains no harmful chemicals or bleach.
Gently rub the soap into the stain, ensuring thorough coverage without any abrasive ingredients.
Allow the soap, formulated without bleach, to sit for a few minutes to let the gentle yet powerful enzymes work.
Wash treated garments in your regular laundry cycle, confident in the safety of our formula for both white and coloured fabrics.
Check results after washing and enjoy your freshly cleaned clothes, free from stubborn stains and harsh chemical residue.
description: Product Description Apply the wet soap bar directly onto stained areas of fabric Identify Stains : Before starting the laundry process, identify the areas on your garments where stains are present. Common areas include shirt collars, cuffs, and other heavily soiled spots. Wash as Usual: After allowing the soap to work its magic, proceed with your regular laundry routine. Using our Stain Remover Bar is a breeze. Simply rub it directly onto shirt collars and other everyday stains before tossing them into your regular wash cycle. Let the powerful formula work its magic, leaving your laundry looking spotless and revitalized. Allow the soap, formulated without bleach, to sit for a few minutes to let the gentle yet powerful enzymes work. Check Results : Once the laundry cycle is complete, check the treated garments for any remaining stains. In most cases, the stain should be significantly reduced or completely gone. If any stains persist, you may need to repeat the treatment process or try alternative stain removal methods. Provenience Stain Remover Soap Bar 4 x 100gr Quad Pack Provenience Stain Remover Soap Bar, your ultimate solution for tackling stubborn stains with ease! With our convenient 4-pack , each bar weighing 100 grams , you'll have more than enough stain-fighting power to keep your laundry looking fresh and clean. Check results after washing and enjoy your freshly cleaned clothes, free from stubborn stains and harsh chemical residue. How to Use: Identify Stains : Before starting the laundry process, identify the areas on your garments where stains are present. Common areas include shirt collars, cuffs, and other heavily soiled spots. Pre-Treat Stains : Take the Stain Remover Soap Bar and wet it slightly with water. Then, directly apply the wet bar onto the stained areas of the fabric. Ensure thorough coverage of the stain with the soap. Rub Gently : Using your fingers or the bar itself, gently rub the soap into the stained areas. Apply a bit of pressure to ensure the soap penetrates deep into the fabric fibres where the stain is embedded. Let It Sit : Once the stain is treated with the soap, allow it to sit for a few minutes. This gives the enzymes in the soap time to work on breaking down and lifting the stain from the fabric. Wash as Usual : After allowing the soap to work its magic, proceed with your regular laundry routine. Place the treated garments in the washing machine along with the rest of your laundry load. Wash Cycle : Run the washing machine on your preferred setting, following the manufacturer's instructions for water temperature and detergent use. The Stain Remover Soap Bar will continue to work on removing stains during the wash cycle. Check Results : Once the laundry cycle is complete, check the treated garments for any remaining stains. In most cases, the stain should be significantly reduced or completely gone. If any stains persist, you may need to repeat the treatment process or try alternative stain removal methods. Enjoy Clean Clothes : Once the stains are successfully removed, enjoy your freshly laundered garments looking clean and revitalized. By following these simple steps, you can effectively use our Stain Remover Soap Bar to tackle even the toughest stains and keep your clothes looking their best!
